tasks.title: Stabilize internal-cloud ingress guardrails
tasks.what: Implement and verify trusted ingress routing for internal cloud traffic.
tasks.why: Ensures public/internal traffic cannot bypass trust state controls.
tasks.how: Host-header route table, trust gate checks, and route enable/disable control.
tasks.acceptance: Ingress allows trusted routes and blocks quarantined/revoked routes.
tasks.rollback: Disable ingress endpoints and revert to previous routing behavior.

tasks.title: Reconcile tunnel routes from cloud source
tasks.what: Continuously sync tunnel routing from cloud source-of-truth.
tasks.why: Prevents stale/unhealthy services from remaining exposed.
tasks.how: Periodic reconcile loop over cloud registry + trust lookups.
tasks.rollback: Disable reconcile loop via config and keep manual route control only.

tasks.title: Persist guardian policy and decisions
tasks.what: Persist Guardian state and enforce versioned public-exposure policy controls.
tasks.why: Ensures deterministic trust policy behavior across restarts and phases.
tasks.how: Atomic state persistence, policy version bumping, explicit deny-rule evaluation.
tasks.acceptance: Policy and decisions survive restart and drive allow/deny behavior.
tasks.rollback: Revert to in-memory state and remove policy rule endpoints.

tasks.title: Run ecosystem stack freshness audit
tasks.what: Generate and review ecosystem dependency/runtime freshness report.
tasks.why: Reduces silent security and maintenance drift across 80+ apps.
tasks.how: Execute stack-control workflow and convert findings into backlog tasks.
tasks.acceptance: latest.json and latest.md reports are generated and reviewed.
tasks.rollback: Skip enforcement gate but keep report generation active.

tasks.title: Run nit cross-repo verification
tasks.what: Execute ecosystem-wide test verification and publish consolidated status.
tasks.why: Maintains one confidence signal before integrations/releases.
tasks.how: Run NIT workflow and capture machine-readable test report.
tasks.acceptance: NIT output generated with explicit pass/fail signals per repo.
tasks.rollback: Use per-repo testing only until NIT issues are resolved.
